upstream_reconciliation_rationale: Same four findings the operations stage already acknowledged: a "stone → 300/400/500" false-positive (the detectors mis-treat Tailwind CSS stone-NNN color tokens in design specs as HTTP status codes), and three field-name divergences for the "feedback author identity" concept (acknowledged_by / author_class / author_type appear across 16 inception/design/product artifacts because the doc terminology evolved over the intent's lifetime — `author_class` is the canonical implementation name in drift-baseline.ts:72; the older synonyms remain in committed prior-stage artifacts as historical context). These are pre-existing artifact-corpus divergences not caused by the security stage; security's threat-model and assessments artifacts use the canonical `author_class` name.
